query:
SELECT 
  'procedimentosTasy' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM procedimentosTasy WHERE importacaoId = 150003
UNION ALL
SELECT 'matMedTasy', COUNT(*) FROM matMedTasy WHERE importacaoId = 150003
UNION ALL
SELECT 'contasPagasTasy', COUNT(*) FROM contasPagasTasy WHERE estabelecimentoId = 2
UNION ALL
SELECT 'itensPagosTasy', COUNT(*) FROM itensPagosTasy WHERE estabelecimentoId = 2;
